title: 日本ダービーの後に・完走、完勝！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket runs the incredible race of her
dreams and emerges a champion. Cheers of
"Tickezo" echo throughout the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Immensely satisfied that she was able to inspire
her fans, she promises to deliver another heated
race at the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin and Biwa Hayahide congratulate
Winning Ticket on her victory, but swear that
they won't lose next time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket bursts into uncontrollable tears,
passionately thanking her rivals for their
contributions to her victory.
